name: 太子為女主當眾下跪
name_en: Prince kneeling before enemy to save heroine
description: 叛軍首領挾持女主，太子為救她在眾人面前屈膝。這個畫面的衝擊力來自權力關係的極致反轉——天下最尊貴的人為最卑微的人放下一切。
tags: 尊嚴與愛情的終極碰撞，男主形象的顛覆性瞬間

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: You want to save her, huh? Fine, then kneel before me. ... Your highness, don't. Your highness, please don't.
examples.context: 尊嚴與愛情的終極碰撞，男主形象的顛覆性瞬間
